title: Section 24
content: 1[24. Effect of other laws.--The provisions of this Act and the rules or orders made thereunder shall have effect notwithstanding anything inconsistent therewith contained in any other law for the time being in force.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 2023, s. 2 and Schedule, for section 24 (w.e.f. 1-4-2024).
